hero.headline: Elegant Tent & Decoration Rentals in Bali
hero.subheadline: Creating unforgettable atmospheres for weddings and events since 2000.

items.title: VIP Tents
items.description: Luxurious and elegant tents perfect for weddings and VVIP events, complete with exclusive decorations.

items.title: Standard Tents
items.description: Quality standard tent options with neat ceiling covers suitable for all kinds of events.

items.title: Event Furniture
items.description: Rental of various types of well-maintained and comfortable event chairs and tables.

items.title: Lighting & AC
items.description: Portable AC units and professional light setups to brighten up your event nights.

reviews.name: I Gede Arya
reviews.text: Amazing! The tent decoration for my daughter's wedding was incredibly luxurious. The staff was also highly professional.

reviews.name: Ni Made Ayu
reviews.text: The quality of the tents and chairs is top-notch, and the AC was cold keeping all guests comfortable. Thank you Purusa Utama!

reviews.name: I Nyoman Sandiartha
reviews.text: The price is completely worth the quality provided. Highly recommended for any large events in Bali.

footer.address: Jl. Seririt-Pupuan, Ringdikit, Kec. Seririt, Kabupaten Buleleng, Bali 81153
